detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use axipcie driver.

sect1.title: xaxipcie_ep_cdma_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxipcie driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver when it is configured as an endpoint and assumes that an axicdma IP is available in the system.

sect1.title: xaxipcie_ep_enable_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxipcie driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver when it is configured as an endpoint.

sect1.title: xaxipcie_rc_cdma_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxipcie driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver when it is configured as a root port and axicdma IP is included in the system.

sect1.title: xaxipcie_rc_enumerate_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XAxipcie driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver when it is configured as a root port.
